## Traceability (required)

- **PRD:** <!-- path or link -->
- **PRD-REF:** <!-- e.g. PRD-REF-FEATURE-001-SEC3.2 -->
- **ADO:** <!-- AB#123456 -->
- **Stack / area:** <!-- backend | frontend | qa | … -->

_Pull requests must include a `PRD-REF-*-SEC*` token and an `AB#` work item reference in the description. CI enforces this on GitHub._

## Checklist

- [ ] Story / task scope matches linked work item
- [ ] Tests added or updated where applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior or contracts changed
